{{- /* Embed an asciicast (.cast) with the asciinema player: play / pause / seek, crisp selectable text, far smaller than a GIF. The cast is a page resource (a .cast file next to the page's content file). {{< asciinema src="what-youll-build.cast" >}} Tunable params (all optional): bg terminal background (default #001D2F — brand "Dark Spruce") fg default text color (default #D7E9EE — soft cyan-tinted white) fontsize terminalFontSize: "small" | "medium" | "big" | a CSS size like "16px" (default "medium"). NOTE: only takes effect when the player isn't width-fitted; we keep fit:"width" so the terminal fills the column, so to make text bigger re-record at fewer cols. poster frame shown before play, e.g. "npt:2:13" theme asciinema palette for the basic 16 colors (default "monokai"); bat output is 24-bit truecolor, so this mainly affects bg/fg/prompt. */ -}} {{- if not (.Get "src") -}} {{ errorf "\n\nNo src for {{< asciinema >}} tag on %s\n\n" .Position }} {{- end -}} {{- $cast := .Page.Resources.GetMatch (.Get "src") -}} {{- if not $cast -}} {{ warnf "Unable to find cast %q as a page resource on %s" (.Get "src") .Page.File }} {{- end -}} {{- with $cast -}} {{- $id := printf "asciinema-%s" (substr (.Permalink | md5) 0 10) -}} {{- $bg := $.Get "bg" | default "#001D2F" -}} {{- $fg := $.Get "fg" | default "#D7E9EE" -}}
{{- end -}}
